nasb.text: “But who am I and who are my people that we should be able to offer as generously as this? For all things come from You, and from Your hand we have given You.

esv.text: “But who am I, and what is my people, that we should be able thus to offer willingly? For all things come from you, and of your own have we given you.

cnv.text: 我算甚麼？我的人民又算甚麼？竟有力量這樣樂意奉獻？因為萬物都是從你而來，我們只是把從你手裡得來的，奉獻給你。

ccb.text: “我算什么，我的人民算什么，怎么配向你奉献？因为万物都从你而来，我们只是把从你那里得来的献给你。
